CREATE TABLE test_trim (input_string String);
INSERT INTO test_trim VALUES ('   Hello, world!   ');
INSERT INTO test_trim VALUES ('(   Hello, world!   )');
INSERT INTO test_trim VALUES ('#Example#');
INSERT INTO test_trim VALUES ('***Trim this***');
INSERT INTO test_trim VALUES ('   Leading spaces');
INSERT INTO test_trim VALUES ('Trailing spaces   ');
INSERT INTO test_trim VALUES ('   Both sides   ');
SELECT trim(input_string) FROM test_trim;
SELECT trim(BOTH ' ()' FROM input_string) FROM test_trim;
SELECT trim(LEADING ' ' FROM input_string) FROM test_trim;
SELECT trim(TRAILING ' ' FROM input_string) FROM test_trim;
SELECT trim(BOTH '*' FROM input_string) FROM test_trim;
SELECT trim(LEADING '#' FROM input_string) FROM test_trim;
SELECT trim(TRAILING '#' FROM input_string) FROM test_trim;
SELECT trim(BOTH '***' FROM (SELECT input_string FROM test_trim WHERE input_string LIKE '%*%'));
SELECT trim(BOTH 'abc' FROM (SELECT input_string FROM test_trim WHERE LENGTH(input_string) > 10));
SELECT input_string, trim(input_string) AS trimmed_output FROM test_trim;
SELECT input_string, trim(LEADING ' ' FROM trim(TRAILING ' ' FROM input_string)) AS cleaned_output FROM test_trim;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_trim WHERE trim(input_string) = 'Hello, world!';
CREATE TABLE test_results AS SELECT input_string, trim(input_string) AS trimmed_output FROM test_trim;
